name: Fu Chian Tire Co.,Ltd.
summary: Fu Chian Tire Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells retread tires in Taiwan. The company also offers high and low temperature tread rubber products, gums, backing products, rubber flooring products, silicone products, rubber compounds, and other rubber products. It is also involved in the provision of rubber manufacturing machines, as well as in the import and export activities. Fu Chian Tire Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is based in Yuanlin City, Taiwan.
